CalendarState.title: CalendarState
CalendarState.description: Entire application state for the PTO and Coverage Planner

timeClockUrl.description: The dynamic link to the Employee Time Clock

handbookUrl.description: The dynamic link to the Employee Handbook

companyHolidays.description: Object tracking custom holidays mapped by date key

disabledHolidays.description: Array of standard holiday names disabled by user

dayRows.description: Core cell grid schedules and color classes mapped by date key

/calendars/{calendarId}.description: Collection storing shared calendar planner states
